name: order_id
description: Sticky.io order id (natural key / MERGE key).

name: company
description: Sticky.io app subdomain this order came from.

name: time_stamp
description: Raw sale timestamp string exactly as sticky.io sent it (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS).

name: time_of_sale
description: time_stamp parsed to a real UTC timestamp.

name: date_of_sale
description: Sale date in the reporting timezone (partition column).

name: loaded_at
description: When this row was written by the ETL.

name: raw_order
description: The COMPLETE order object as JSON text - nothing dropped (utm_info, custom_fields, order_customer_types, products, totals_breakdown, ...).
